subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify the fricative sounds treated in the lesson
Recognise example words for each contrast

sections.heading: Labio-dental Contrast
sections.content: The note contrasts /f/ and /v/ with examples such as vine/fine, vast/fast, halve/half, alive/life, prove/proof, save/safe, and starve/staff.

sections.heading: Alveolar and Post-alveolar Contrast
sections.content: It also contrasts /s/ and /z/ with examples like sow/zoo, sip/zip, rice/rise, and /ʒ/ with /ʃ/ through examples such as erasure, pleasure, treasure, measure, chauffeur, and mirage.
